## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`

## Tax / Policy Safety

- [ ] No production tax advice is introduced without source, jurisdiction and date metadata.
- [ ] Sensitive taxpayer or credential data is not committed.
